name: India
subtitle: States & Union Territories — tap a state to see its facts

facts.note: India's only active volcano: Barren Island.
Carved out of Madhya Pradesh in 2000.

regions.name: Dadra and Nagar Haveli and Daman and Diu

facts.note: Merged into one UT on 26 Jan 2020.
Home to the Statue of Unity & Gir lions.
Largest state by area after reorganisation.
Madras State renamed Tamil Nadu in 1969.
Most Lok Sabha seats (80) of any state.

locations.name: Taj Mahal
locations.note: Marble mausoleum; UNESCO World Heritage Site (1983).

locations.name: Red Fort
locations.note: PM hoists the national flag here on Independence Day.

locations.name: Gateway of India
locations.note: Built to commemorate the 1911 royal visit.

locations.name: Charminar
locations.note: Built by Quli Qutb Shah; symbol of Hyderabad.

locations.name: Konark Sun Temple
locations.note: Chariot-shaped temple of Surya; UNESCO site.

locations.name: Victoria Memorial
locations.note: Marble museum dedicated to Queen Victoria.

locations.name: Meenakshi Temple
locations.note: Towering gopurams of the Dravidian style.

locations.name: Statue of Unity
locations.note: World's tallest statue — Sardar Vallabhbhai Patel.

locations.name: Kaziranga National Park
locations.note: Two-thirds of the world's one-horned rhinos.
